target.description: Optional target path, command ID, gate, tier, or validator scope.

target_kind.description: Kind of validation target routed through the command boundary.

target_path.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to a governed target artifact. Absolute paths must resolve inside the allowed repository roots.

artifact_ref.description: Optional semantic artifact reference for evidence and Workbench projection.

suite_id.description: Validation suite ID used to preserve CLI/headless/Workbench result parity.

profile.description: Validation profile requested by the command caller.

surface.description: Declared invocation surface for command/result parity checks.

emit_reports.description: When true, the service adapter may write normal validation report artifacts.

capabilities.description: Capabilities declared by the caller or proof harness for this invocation.

required_capabilities.description: Additional capabilities required by this invocation; missing required values produce typed refusal.
